new_words.definition: 控制模型输出随机性的参数，0 最确定，1+ 最有创意
new_words.example: llm = ChatOpenAI(temperature=0)  # deterministic output

new_words.definition: 在提示中提供少量输入输出示例，引导模型按期望格式回答
new_words.example: FewShotPromptTemplate(examples=[{'q': '...', 'a': '...'}], ...)

new_words.definition: 声音频率高低的感知属性，频率越高音越高
new_words.example: A4 (concert A) has a pitch of 440 Hz

new_words.definition: 按固定音程关系依序排列的一组音符，是旋律和和声的基础
new_words.example: C major scale: C D E F G A B C (no sharps or flats)

new_words.definition: 多个音符同时发声产生的音程关系，为旋律增添色彩和情感
new_words.example: Singing in harmony means two voices at different pitches at once

new_words.definition: 用竖线分隔的固定拍数音乐单元，就像文字中的句子
new_words.example: In 4/4 time, each measure contains exactly 4 quarter-note beats

new_words.definition: 频率比为 2:1 的两个音之间的音程，听起来'相同但高低不同'
new_words.example: A4 (440Hz) and A5 (880Hz) are one octave apart

new_words.definition: 音乐演奏的响度变化，从弱到强用 pp/p/mp/mf/f/ff 标记
new_words.example: pp (pianissimo) = very soft; ff (fortissimo) = very loud

new_words.definition: 将子元素的事件监听绑定到父元素，利用事件冒泡减少监听器数量
new_words.example: list.addEventListener('click', e => { if (e.target.matches('li')) handle(e) })

new_words.definition: 内层函数能访问并记住外层函数作用域变量的特性，即使外层已执行完毕
new_words.example: function counter() { let n=0; return () => ++n }  // returned fn is a closure

new_words.definition: 代表未来某个异步操作结果的对象，状态只能从 pending 变为 fulfilled 或 rejected
new_words.example: fetch('/api').then(r => r.json()).catch(err => console.error(err))

new_words.definition: 限制函数在连续触发时只在最后一次停止后才执行，常用于搜索输入
new_words.example: const search = debounce(query => api.search(query), 300)

new_words.definition: 限制函数在固定时间间隔内最多执行一次，常用于滚动/窗口 resize
new_words.example: window.addEventListener('scroll', throttle(handleScroll, 100))

new_words.definition: 按需加载资源（图片、组件、路由等），而非页面初始化时全部加载
new_words.example: const UserProfile = defineAsyncComponent(() => import('./UserProfile.vue'))

new_words.definition: 用户在屏幕上实际可见的网页区域，响应式设计的基准参照
new_words.example: <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1'>

new_words.definition: 用有意义的标签（article/section/header）描述内容结构，而非全用 div
new_words.example:
Title

Content

// vs
...

new_words.definition: 确保网页对所有用户（包括残障人士）可用的设计实践，简称 a11y
new_words.example: <button aria-label='Close dialog'>×</button>  // screen reader can read it

new_words.definition: 结合向量检索和 LLM 生成的架构：先检索相关文档，再让模型基于文档回答
new_words.example: chain = {'context': retriever, 'question': passthrough} | prompt | llm

new_words.definition: 用管道符 | 串联 LangChain 组件的 DSL，所有组件都实现 Runnable 接口
new_words.example: chain = prompt | llm | StrOutputParser()  # this is LCEL

new_words.definition: LangChain 中所有组件（LLM、提示、解析器等）共同实现的标准接口
new_words.example: # Runnables support: invoke, stream, batch, ainvoke, astream

new_sentences.definition: 在别人发言后礼貌地加入自己的观点或信息
new_sentences.example: I'd like to add something — we also need to consider mobile users.

new_sentences.definition: 允许听众在自己发言时提问或发表意见，营造开放的交流氛围
new_sentences.example: I'll walk through the architecture. Feel free to interrupt me with questions.

new_sentences.zh: 我们可以稍后再讨论这个吗？
new_sentences.definition: 将某个话题推迟到更合适的时机讨论，避免当前跑题
new_sentences.example: That's important but out of scope today. Could we revisit this later?

new_sentences.zh: 让我们回头再讨论这个。
new_sentences.definition: 在讨论其他内容后返回到之前未解决的话题
new_sentences.example: We got sidetracked. Let's circle back to the deployment timeline.

new_sentences.en: I want to make sure we're on the same page.
new_sentences.zh: 我想确认我们的理解是一致的。
new_sentences.definition: 核实双方对某件事的理解完全相同，避免误解导致工作偏差
new_sentences.example: Before we start coding, I want to make sure we're on the same page about the API contract.
